description: Agile CRM is an all-in-one cloud platform for small to mid-size businesses, combining contact management, marketing automation, and helpdesk in one affordable tool.
tagline: All-in-one CRM for sales, marketing, and support
overview: Agile CRM gives growing businesses a single platform to manage their sales pipeline, run marketing campaigns, and handle customer support without juggling separate applications. Ready-to-use templates and built-in integrations mean teams can be productive from day one.
what_is: Agile CRM is a cloud-based platform that brings together sales, marketing, and customer service management in one place. Built for small to medium-sized businesses, it combines contact management, marketing automation, and helpdesk functionality into an affordable, easy-to-deploy solution that does not require a large IT footprint.

The platform is well suited to managing sales pipelines, running automated marketing campaigns, and handling customer support through ticketing and feedback tools. Pre-built templates and a broad set of integrations, including email marketing, telephony, and social media, help teams improve productivity quickly after setup.

Agile CRM is designed for growing companies that want a consolidated, straightforward tool rather than a collection of specialized applications. It is not intended for large enterprises requiring deep customization or advanced analytics beyond what an all-in-one SMB platform provides.
